mapper.select: SELECT no, name, email, phone, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'FMMonth FMDD"일"') AS reg_date, gender, nickname, self_pr, black, TO_CHAR(birth, 'FMMonth FMDD"일"') AS birth FROM member ORDER BY no DESC
SELECT group_no, group_title, category, user_max, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'FMMonth FMDD"일"') AS reg_date, area, type, approval FROM group_morak WHERE approval = 'N' ORDER BY group_no DESC
SELECT group_no, group_title, category, user_max, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'FMMonth FMDD"일"') AS reg_date, area, type FROM group_morak WHERE approval = 'N' WHERE GROUP_NO=#{groupNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE group_morak SET approval = 'Y' WHERE group_no = #{groupNo}
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS transaction_date, -- 날짜 형식 변환 SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM Transaction_log GROUP BY TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY transaction_date
SELECT gender, count(*) as count FROM MEMBER GROUP BY gender

SELECT CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, birth) / 12) BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN '10대' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, birth) / 12) BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20대' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, birth) / 12) BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30대' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, birth) / 12) BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40대' ELSE '50대 이상' END AS age_group, COUNT(*) AS count FROM member GROUP BY CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, birth) / 12) BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN '10대' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, birth) / 12) BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20대' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, birth) / 12) BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30대' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, birth) / 12) BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40대' ELSE '50대 이상' END ORDER BY age_group
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS category_count FROM group_morak GROUP BY category
SELECT gm.group_title, COUNT(b.basket_no) AS basket_count FROM group_morak gm LEFT JOIN basket b ON gm.group_no = b.group_no GROUP BY gm.group_title ORDER BY basket_count DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
SELECT VISIT_URL, COUNT(DISTINCT IP) AS visitor_count FROM VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_URL LIKE '/group/detail%' GROUP BY VISIT_URL ORDER BY visitor_count DESC
